# Dr. Li Wei — Dental Care, Hong Kong

> Dr. Li Wei (李蔚) is a general, cosmetic and implant dentist in Hong Kong with over 12 years of clinical experience. She offers gentle, honest dental care for the whole family — preventive dentistry, cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, and clear aligners — at a calm pace, with every option and cost explained before treatment begins. Consultations in Cantonese, English, and Mandarin.

## Treatments
- General & Preventive Dentistry: check-ups, scaling and polishing, tooth-coloured fillings, root canal treatment.
- Cosmetic Dentistry: professional teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, cosmetic bonding, with a natural-looking result.
- Dental Implants & Restorations: implants, crowns, bridges, and dentures to restore function and appearance.
- Clear Aligners & Orthodontics: near-invisible removable aligners (e.g. Invisalign) for teens and adults.

## Key facts
- Sees nervous patients and children; works gently and never rushes.
- Suitability and exact cost are confirmed only at an in-person examination — no diagnosis or pricing is given online.
- Referral-led practice: most new patients come by word of mouth.
- Based in Hong Kong.

## Contact
- Booking: via the website form or WhatsApp.
- Languages: Cantonese, English, Mandarin.

## Notes
This site is for general information only and does not constitute dental or medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Please seek personalised advice from Dr. Li Wei before making any decision about your dental care.
